channel.title: Statistics Analysis Tool
channel.description: Most recent changes with link to updates.

item.title: Statistics Analysis Tool v9.0.0
item.sparkle:releaseNotes:
Added

  • Guild and alliance information is now displayed in loot tracking
  • A gathering history chart with filtering options has been added
  • Map history now supports selecting entries and copying names to the clipboard
  • Column headers have been added to the map history for better clarity
  • An option to clear the map history has been added
  • Silver per hour statistics have been added to gathering tracking
  • An info popup has been added to the item search

Changed

  • Map history is now saved and restored between sessions
  • The info popup interaction in loot comparator tab has been changed from hover to click and improved for readability

Fixed

  • The AODP API URL has been fixed
  • Trade statistics now correctly handle instant buy and sell transactions

Technical

  • The update system has been replaced with NetSparkle
  • Automated installer creation has been added

Misc

  • UI improvements
  • General cleanup and internal improvements
